    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    F

    fade(Node, double, double, double) - Static method in class util.StageManager
    Creates a general fade transition for the specified node.
    fadeIn(Node, double) - Static method in class util.StageManager
    Creates a fade-in transition for the specified node.
    fadeOut(Node, double) - Static method in class util.StageManager
    Creates a fade-out transition for the specified node.
    fillMilkSupply() - Static method in class logic.counters.IceCreamMachine
    Fills the milk supply.
    finalPlayerCashLabelList - Variable in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Label for player's final cash amount at the end of the game.
    flavor - Variable in class logic.counters.IceCreamMachine
    The flavor of ice cream this machine produces.
    flavor - Variable in class logic.menus.IceCreamCone
    The flavor of the ice cream in the cone.
    flavor - Variable in class logic.menus.IceCreamSandwich
    The flavor of the ice cream inside the sandwich.
    FoodOrder - Class in gui.components
    Customer's food order object
    FoodOrder() - Constructor for class gui.components.FoodOrder
    Create random food order and its order paper UI
    foodOrders - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    List of all food orders.
    frameCount - Variable in class sprites.AnimatedSprite
    The total number of frames in the animation.
    frameNumber - Variable in class sprites.AnimatedSprite
    The current frame number being displayed.
    frameTime - Variable in class sprites.AnimatedSprite
    The duration of a single frame.
    FRENCH_FRIES - Enum constant in enum class logic.MenuType
    Enum constant for menu type.
    FrenchFries - Class in logic.menus
    Represents the french fries menu item.
    FrenchFries() - Constructor for class logic.menus.FrenchFries
    Constructs a French Fries menu with a random amount
    FrenchFries(int) - Constructor for class logic.menus.FrenchFries
    Constructs a French Fries menu with specific amount.
    friedPercentage - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Potato
    The percentage to which the potato has been fried.
    friedPercentageIncrement - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Potato
    The increment value for the fried percentage per tick.
    fry() - Method in interface entity.Fryable
    Increase fried percentage of Fryable ingredient.
    fry() - Method in class entity.ingredients.Potato
    Increase fried percentage of Fryable ingredient.
    Fryable - Interface in entity
    Interface for fryable ingredient which can be interacted with using Deep fryer
